en: The teacher is here.

ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: Asihima haip, namal’uu’in laqbing, muskun ata munata qaitmal!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: Uu i! munhaan ata sisila vanglaz qaitmal.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: Asitau laqbingin, pismali ata laqbing minaunin!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: Islunquan laqbingin, namuskun aak tina naak munhaan kiukai lihai.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?
I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: Sinsi! masaqbit naak a tian, asa aak munata.
ch: A:老師!我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?
It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Sinsi! masaqbit daingaz naak a bungu, namasingav aak minaunin.
ch: A:老師!我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: Sinsi! Namasingav aak muqnin tu asitas’a, Aupa namunhaan aak ising.
ch: A:老師!我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Aquz?

ab: Masaqbit istaa tian, ihaan aipa unanata’an.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Pima?

ab: Sinsi! Masaqbit Pima ta qaungqaung, masingav aipa haip qanian.
en: Teacher, Pima has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: Mavia ka Aquz tu uka minsuma i?
en: Why didn’t Aquz come?
She has a fever.
